# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/project/android/build_64
# It was generated by CMake: /opt/homebrew/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//No help, variable specified on the command line.

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
ANDROID_NATIVE_API_LEVEL:UNINITIALIZED=android-21

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
ANDROID_STL:UNINITIALIZED=c++_static

//Build PC Commandline.
BUILD_MLS:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_PLUGIN:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/Users/wuzewen/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/llvm-addr2line

//Archiver
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/Users/wuzewen/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/llvm-ar

//ASM compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/Users/wuzewen/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/clang

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/Users/wuzewen/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/llvm-ar

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS:FILEPATH=/Users/wuzewen/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/clang-scan-deps

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/Users/wuzewen/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/llvm-ranlib

//Flags used by the compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the compiler during debug builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the compiler during release builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/Users/wuzewen/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/llvm-ar

//`clang-scan-deps` dependency scanner
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_CLANG_SCAN_DEPS:FILEPATH=/Users/wuzewen/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/clang-scan-deps

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/Users/wuzewen/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/llvm-ranlib

CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the compiler during debug builds.

//If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries,
// but are added when building.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the archiver during the creation of static libraries

// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.

CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE:FILEPATH=/Users/wuzewen/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/build/cmake/android.toolchain.cmake

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Path to KleidiAI source (downloaded or provided)
KLEIDIAI_SRC_DIR:PATH=/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/project/android/build_64/_deps/kleidiai-1.14.0

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
LLM_SUPPORT_AUDIO:UNINITIALIZED=true

//Support HTTP resource download
LLM_SUPPORT_HTTP_RESOURCE:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
LLM_SUPPORT_VISION:UNINITIALIZED=true

//Build MNN.framework instead of traditional .a/.dylib
MNN_AAPL_FMWK:BOOL=OFF

//Enable ARMv8.2's FP16 Compute
MNN_ARM82:BOOL=true

//Enable audio test
MNN_AUDIO_TEST:BOOL=OFF

//Open AVX2 Compile for x86 if possible
MNN_AVX2:BOOL=ON

//Enable AVX512
MNN_AVX512:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
MNN_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/project/android/build_64

//Build audio api in MNN.
MNN_BUILD_AUDIO:BOOL=true

//Build benchmark or not
MNN_BUILD_BENCHMARK:BOOL=ON

//Build with codegen
MNN_BUILD_CODEGEN:BOOL=OFF

//Build Converter
MNN_BUILD_CONVERTER:BOOL=OFF

//Build demo/exec or not
MNN_BUILD_DEMO:BOOL=OFF

//Build diffusion demo based MNN.
MNN_BUILD_DIFFUSION:BOOL=ON

//Build from command
MNN_BUILD_FOR_ANDROID_COMMAND:BOOL=true

//Build -mfloat-abi=hard or not
MNN_BUILD_HARD:BOOL=OFF

//Build llm library based MNN.
MNN_BUILD_LLM:BOOL=true

//If build llm library, build it with omni (support image / audio)
MNN_BUILD_LLM_OMNI:BOOL=OFF

//Build minimal MNN so, set MNN_SKIPBUILD_GEOMETRY and MNN_REDUCE_SIZE
// ON
MNN_BUILD_MINI:BOOL=OFF

//<docstring>
MNN_BUILD_OPENCV:BOOL=ON

//Build with protobuffer in MNN
MNN_BUILD_PROTOBUFFER:BOOL=ON

//Build Quantized Tools or not
MNN_BUILD_QUANTOOLS:BOOL=OFF

//MNN build shared or static lib
MNN_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=ON

//Build tests or not
MNN_BUILD_TEST:BOOL=ON

//Build tools/cpp or not
MNN_BUILD_TOOLS:BOOL=ON

//Build MNN's training framework
MNN_BUILD_TRAIN:BOOL=OFF

//Enable calib3d
MNN_CALIB3D:BOOL=ON

//Enable CoreML
MNN_COREML:BOOL=OFF

//Build MNN CPU weight dequant related gemm kernels.
MNN_CPU_WEIGHT_DEQUANT_GEMM:BOOL=true

//Enable CUDA
MNN_CUDA:BOOL=OFF

//Enable CUDA profile
MNN_CUDA_PROFILE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable cv core
MNN_CVCORE:BOOL=ON

//MNN Debug Memory Access
MNN_DEBUG_MEMORY:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Tensor Size
MNN_DEBUG_TENSOR_SIZE:BOOL=OFF

//Build with coverage enable
MNN_ENABLE_COVERAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Build Evaluation Tools or not
MNN_EVALUATION:BOOL=OFF

//Force compute Expr's shape directly cost
MNN_EXPR_SHAPE_EAGER:BOOL=OFF

//Disable Multi Thread
MNN_FORBID_MULTI_THREAD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable time profiling for the OpenCL backend and Vulkan backend.
MNN_GPU_TIME_PROFILE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable MNN Gpu Debug
MNN_GPU_TRACE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable imgcodecs
MNN_IMGCODECS:BOOL=true

//Enable imgproc color
MNN_IMGPROC_COLOR:BOOL=ON

//Enable imgproc draw
MNN_IMGPROC_DRAW:BOOL=ON

//Enable imgproc filter
MNN_IMGPROC_FILTER:BOOL=ON

//Enable imgproc geometric
MNN_IMGPROC_GEOMETRIC:BOOL=ON

//Enable imgproc histograms
MNN_IMGPROC_HISTOGRAMS:BOOL=ON

//Enable imgproc miscellaneous
MNN_IMGPROC_MISCELLANEOUS:BOOL=ON

//Enable imgproc structral
MNN_IMGPROC_STRUCTRAL:BOOL=ON

//Build with MNN internal features, such as model authentication,
// metrics logging
MNN_INTERNAL:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
MNN_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Build MNN Jni for java to use
MNN_JNI:BOOL=OFF

//Enable KLEIDIAI
MNN_KLEIDIAI:BOOL=ON

//Use KLEIDIAI kernels by default
MNN_KLEIDIAI_DEFAULT_ON:BOOL=OFF

//Dependencies for the target
MNN_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;-pthread;general;log;general;m;general;android;

//Build LLM demo
MNN_LLM_BUILD_DEMO:BOOL=ON

//Build LLM unit tests
MNN_LLM_BUILD_TEST:BOOL=OFF

//<docstring>
MNN_LOW_MEMORY:BOOL=ON

//Enable Metal
MNN_METAL:BOOL=OFF

//Use Metal4 tensor instructions
MNN_METAL_TENSOR:BOOL=ON

//Enable MUSA (Moore Threads GPU)
MNN_MUSA:BOOL=OFF

//Map MUSA to CUDA for testing
MNN_MUSA_COMPAT_CUDA:BOOL=OFF

//MUSA stub mode (compile only, no GPU)
MNN_MUSA_COMPAT_STUB:BOOL=ON

//Use native MUSA SDK
MNN_MUSA_NATIVE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable NNAPI
MNN_NNAPI:BOOL=OFF

//Enable oneDNN
MNN_ONEDNN:BOOL=OFF

//Enable OpenCL
MNN_OPENCL:BOOL=true

//Disable MNN OpenCL Buffer Opt
MNN_OPENCL_SIZE_CUT:BOOL=OFF

//Enable opencv benchmark
MNN_OPENCV_BENCH:BOOL=OFF

//Enable opencv test
MNN_OPENCV_TEST:BOOL=OFF

//Enable OpenGL
MNN_OPENGL:BOOL=OFF

//Use OpenMP's thread pool implementation. Does not work on iOS
// or Mac OS
MNN_OPENMP:BOOL=OFF

//Enable QNN
MNN_QNN:BOOL=OFF

//Enable QNN Online Finalize
MNN_QNN_ONLINE_FINALIZE:BOOL=ON

//Remove not common op and optimize code
MNN_REDUCE_SIZE:BOOL=OFF

//Build MNN Backends and expression separately. Only works with
// MNN_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON
MNN_SEP_BUILD:BOOL=OFF

//Skip Build MNN-Geometry, then only supports fixed shape models.
MNN_SKIPBUILD_GEOMETRY:BOOL=OFF

//Use Arm sme2 instructions
MNN_SME2:BOOL=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
MNN_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android

//Enable MNN's bf16 op
MNN_SUPPORT_BF16:BOOL=OFF

//Enable MNN's tflite quantized op
MNN_SUPPORT_DEPRECATED_OP:BOOL=OFF

//Enable MNN's DEPRECATED op's geometry such as conv3d / deconv3d,
// which has been treated in converter
MNN_SUPPORT_DEPRECATED_OPV2:BOOL=ON

//Enable ARMv8.2's FP16 Compute for armv7 arch, may cause library
// not valid for 32 bit cpu
MNN_SUPPORT_FP16_ARMV7:BOOL=OFF

//Add int8 op for layernorm, binary, unary, scale, softmax, interp
MNN_SUPPORT_QUANT_EXTEND:BOOL=ON

//Enable MNN Render Ops
MNN_SUPPORT_RENDER:BOOL=OFF

//<docstring>
MNN_SUPPORT_TRANSFORMER_FUSE:BOOL=ON

//Enable TensorRT
MNN_TENSORRT:BOOL=OFF

//Enable MNN use c++11
MNN_USE_CPP11:BOOL=ON

//Use Logcat intead of print for info
MNN_USE_LOGCAT:BOOL=true

//Enable RVV
MNN_USE_RVV:BOOL=OFF

//Use SSE optimization for x86 if possiable
MNN_USE_SSE:BOOL=OFF

//For opencl and vulkan, use system lib or use dlopen
MNN_USE_SYSTEM_LIB:BOOL=OFF

//Use MNN's own thread pool implementation
MNN_USE_THREAD_POOL:BOOL=ON

//Enable Vulkan
MNN_VULKAN:BOOL=OFF

//MNN use /MT on Windows dll
MNN_WIN_RUNTIME_MT:BOOL=OFF

//Build with plugin op support.
MNN_WITH_PLUGIN:BOOL=OFF

//Native Include Path
NATIVE_INCLUDE_OUTPUT:BOOL=.

//Native Library Path
NATIVE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT:BOOL=.

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Name of external makefile project generator.
CMAKE_EXTRA_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator.
CMAKE_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=Unix Makefiles
//Generator instance identifier.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_INSTANCE:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator platform.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator toolset.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_TOOLSET:INTERNAL=
//Test CMAKE_HAVE_LIBC_PTHREAD
CMAKE_HAVE_LIBC_PTHREAD:INTERNAL=
//Have library pthreads
CMAKE_HAVE_PTHREADS_CREATE:INTERNAL=
//Have library pthread
CMAKE_HAVE_PTHREAD_CREATE:INTERNAL=
//Source directory with the top level CMakeLists.txt file for this
// project
CMAKE_HOME_DIRECTORY:INTERNAL=/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android
//Install .so files without execute permission.
CMAKE_INSTALL_SO_NO_EXE:INTERNAL=0
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_LINKER
CMAKE_LINKER-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Name of CMakeLists files to read
CMAKE_LIST_FILE_NAME:INTERNAL=CMakeLists.txt
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_NM
CMAKE_NM-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//number of local generators
CMAKE_NUMBER_OF_MAKEFILES:INTERNAL=6
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_OBJCOPY
CMAKE_OBJCOPY-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_OBJDUMP
CMAKE_OBJDUMP-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Platform information initialized

//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_RANLIB
CMAKE_RANLIB-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_READELF
CMAKE_READELF-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to CMake installation.
CMAKE_ROOT:INTERNAL=/opt/homebrew/share/cmake
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG

MNN_INCLUDE_DIRS:INTERNAL=/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/include/;/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/source/;/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/express/;/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/tools/;/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/codegen/;/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/schema/current/;/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/3rd_party/;/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/3rd_party/flatbuffers/include;/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/3rd_party/half;/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/3rd_party/imageHelper;/Users/wuzewen/Projects/Omni/OmniFlow/runtime/openomnibot-merge-worktree/third_party/mnn_android/3rd_party/OpenCLHeaders/

THREADS_HAVE_PTHREAD_ARG:INTERNAL=TRUE
